text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 180 

GAP_OONP_COPAY_OS 

LABEL: Gap Out-of-Network Pharmacy Copay for other days’ supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-payment amount for a day’s supply of the drugs (other than 
1 or 3 months) on this tier, using an out-of-network pharmacy (OONP) during the coverage gap phase 
of the Part D benefit. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: NCH_BENE_IP_DDCTBL_AMT
